title: Lead Instructional Designer at British Council India

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at British Council India
jsonLd.description:
Join the British Council India family as a Instructional Designer in Tiruchirappalli. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About British Council India:
British Council India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with British Council India!
